landing.heroBadge: Launch Your E-Commerce Store for Less Than ₹10/Day
landing.heroDesc: Flomerce helps small businesses and entrepreneurs create professional e-commerce websites with product management, order processing, and secure payments — all from one dashboard.
landing.demoSubtitle: Watch how easy it is to build and manage your online store.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Sell Online
landing.featuresSubtitle: From store setup to order delivery, Flomerce gives you all the tools to run your online business.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose a plan that fits your business. Start with a free trial, upgrade anytime.
landing.footerTagline: Empowering small businesses to sell online with ease.
landing.pwaInstallDesc: Add to home screen for better experience
landing.aboutTagline: Empowering small businesses to sell online

store.title: Complete Online Store
store.desc: Launch a fully functional e-commerce store with product listings, categories, and a beautiful storefront — ready to sell in minutes.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.desc: Track orders from placement to delivery with status updates, customer notifications, and shipping management built in.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.desc: Accept payments via Razorpay with support for UPI, cards, net banking, and wallets. Cash on delivery also supported.

analytics.title: Built-in Analytics
analytics.desc: Monitor your store performance with visitor tracking, page views, traffic sources, and sales insights from your admin panel.

push.title: Push Notifications
push.desc: Engage customers with web push notifications for new products, price drops, and back-in-stock alerts — all automated.

seo.title: Custom Domain & SEO
seo.desc: Connect your own domain, optimize for search engines with built-in SEO tools, sitemaps, and structured data for Google rich results.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your details to access your account.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.verifyEmailNotice: Please verify your email before logging in. Check your inbox.
auth.verificationDesc: Please check your email to verify your account. If you didn't receive it, check your spam folder.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.termsAgreementRequired: Please agree to the Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, and Refund Policy before signing up.

admin.staffLoginDesc: Enter your email and password to access the admin panel.
admin.autoLoginInvalid: Auto-login token is invalid or expired. Please log in.

i18n.title: Admin UI Translations
i18n.desc: Pre-shipped languages: English, Hindi, Spanish, Simplified Chinese, Arabic. Other locales are auto-generated via Microsoft Translator on first request and cached in R2 storage.
i18n.rateLimited: Rate limit reached for this locale (5/day). Try again tomorrow.
i18n.configureFirst: Configure Microsoft Translator credentials in Settings first.

dashboard.noWebsitesYet: You haven't created any websites yet.

products.addFirstHint: Add your first product to get started.
products.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

customers.title: Customers
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search customers by name or email...
customers.derivedFromOrders: Customer data is derived from orders. Once you have orders, customers will appear here.
